verification_gate: Every discovered task source has a stable URI, task count, status vocabulary, authority classification, proof surface, and checksum; archived copies are evidence only; no prior task is silently omitted.
proof_summary: Sealed 16 prior task tables (8 nu_plugin execution CSVs, envctl migration-package task_graph.csv + issue-414/task_graph.csv + status_report.json projection, and envctl .handoff task-card collection + loop/ledger/delivery surfaces). Each has URI, row count, status vocabulary, authority class, proof surface, and sha256. The package status projection's 80-complete claim vs the CSV's 76-pending is captured as the RECOVERY-003 conflict, not silently reconciled.

live_commands.purpose: Recompute + verify every sealed sha256 and coverage
